name: Lamb with Cashew-Nut Curry (Korma)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the masala, combine cashews, chilies, ginger and 1/2 cup of cold water in a blender and blend at high speed for 1 minute.
2. Add cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, garlic, poppy seeds, coriander seeds and cumin to the blender. Blend until completely pulverized. Set aside.
3. Place saffron in a small bowl, pour boiling water over it and let soak for at least 10 minutes.
4. Heat ghee in a heavy skillet over moderate heat until a drop of water sputters instantly. Add onions and fry, stirring constantly, for 7-8 minutes or until soft and golden brown.
5. Stir in salt and masala mixture, then add yogurt. Cook over moderate heat, stirring occasionally, until the ghee lightly films the surface.
6. Add lamb cubes, turning to coat evenly. Squeeze saffron into the skillet and stir with its soaking liquid.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover tightly, and cook for 20 minutes, turning lamb cubes periodically.
8. Scatter half of fresh coriander over the lamb and continue cooking, tightly covered, for 10 more minutes, or until lamb is tender.
9. Serve contents in skillet over a heated platter, sprinkling with lemon juice and remaining fresh coriander.
